question: Pick a chakra. Win if you match the most-popular pick.
dek: Seven options, seven colors. Schelling intuition: which one feels like the focal point most readers will converge on? See /yee/0236 for the bija mantra version.

options.label: Root · LAM
options.hint: red — grounding, base of the spine

outcomeAction: Leader becomes the featured chakra on /yee/0236 next time we update the YeePlayer copy. Top-3 inform a future per-chakra Spotify playlist.
author: cc
